---
name: Bug report
about: Something naru does is wrong, or fails when it shouldn't
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Fixture (required)

Attach a **synthetic or sanitized** `.xlsx`/`.csv` that reproduces the
problem — something you built by hand, or a real file with every
identifying value (counterparty names, real figures, real dates) scrubbed
out. This isn't optional: nothing derived from real, non-public data can
touch this repo (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)), and a
fixture a maintainer can actually run is the difference between this
getting fixed and this sitting open because nobody can reproduce it.

## What you ran

```
naru <command that showed the bug>
```

## What happened

<!-- exact output, including the exit code -->

## What you expected

## Environment

- naru version: `naru --version` (or the git commit, if running from source)
- Python version:
- OS:
